ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., benchmark, control, treatment) */,
  "rescomp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource component being studied */,
  "count_studies" INTEGER /* Number of studies conducted */,
  "reldiff" REAL /* Relative difference between treatment and control groups */,
  "reldiff_normal" REAL /* Relative difference normalized by standard deviation */,
  "yrs_posttreat" INTEGER /* Years post-treatment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project under which the study is conducted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the study is conducted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher conducting the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_rescomp_id FOREIGN KEY ("rescomp_id") REFERENCES resource_components ("rescomp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_components" (
  "rescomp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource component */,
  "resource_component" TEXT /* Name of the resource component (e.g., sheet and rill erosion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource component */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the resource component (e.g., erosion, vegetation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rescomp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_elements" (
  "data_element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data element */,
  "data_element" TEXT /* Name of the data element (e.g., plant foliar cover, bare ground) */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the data element */,
  "count_observations" INTEGER /* Number of observations for the data element */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value of the data element */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value of the data element */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data element (e.g., percentage, square meters) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., continuous, categorical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_data" (
  "study_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study data point */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "data_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element */,
  "treat_value" INTEGER /* Treatment value for the data element */,
  "ctrl_value" INTEGER /* Control value for the data element */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size for the observation */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the data element */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the data element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_data_data_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("data_element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_data_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation or institution of the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
